description_long: This stuffed toy features a large, round head with exaggerated, wide-set eyes that dominate its face, giving it a whimsical and cartoonish appearance. The toy has two pigtails, one on each side of its head, with the left pigtail colored light pink and the right pigtail colored black, adding a playful asymmetry. Its fur is primarily a pale pink shade, and the ears are small and round, positioned just below the pigtails. The eyes are outlined in black with large, light blue irises and small black pupils, conveying a surprised or curious expression. The back of the toy is plain, with no additional features or markings, and a small pink tuft is visible at the bottom, possibly representing a bow or tail. The overall design is soft, rounded, and inviting, making it suitable for children or as a decorative plush in urban environments.
description: A round, pale pink stuffed toy with large cartoon eyes and two pigtails—one pink, one black—giving it a playful, whimsical look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the toy's large, expressive eyes, small ears, and two distinct pigtails—one pink and one black.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the head and the vertical alignment of the pigtails, with the black pigtail more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the head, both pigtails, and a small pink tuft at the bottom.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile with the pink pigtail more visible and the face partially obscured.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is wide-eyed and surprised, with large, open eyes and no visible mouth, giving a look of curiosity or astonishment.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy's head is upright with both pigtails extending outward, and the body is not visible, suggesting a focus on the head and facial features.
